results.title: ElevenLabs Avatars Transform Enterprise Video - Futurum Research
results.content:
The News: ElevenLabs has introduced Avatars in ElevenCreative, a new feature that lets users generate talking-head videos by combining ElevenLabs' proprietary speech models with advanced lip-syncing models in a single interface ( "Introducing Avatars in ElevenCreative: AI Talking Video"). Users can create persistent avatars from images or text prompts, maintain consistent identities across videos, and use a curated library for immediate use. The Avatars workflow eliminates the need for separate audio exports or third-party tools, delivering tighter voice-to-video synchronization. With the new Avatar node in Flows, content teams can automate video production pipelines, enabling batch creation of localized or variant content for marketing, education, or product explainers ( "Introducing [...] Publication Date: June 12, 2026

ElevenLabs has launched Avatars in ElevenCreative, enabling users to generate talking-head videos with integrated voice and lip-sync in a single workflow ( "Introducing Avatars in ElevenCreative: AI Talking Video"). This move streamlines content creation for marketers and educators, raising the stakes for established video AI vendors and forcing enterprises to reconsider their approach to brand identity and localization.

## What is Covered in this Article [...] ### Brand Identity at Scale: Opportunity or New Risk?

Persistent avatars allow brands and educators to maintain a consistent visual and vocal identity across campaigns, courses, or markets ( "Introducing Avatars in ElevenCreative: AI Talking Video"). This is a double-edged sword. On one hand, it delivers unprecedented efficiency and localization, imagine a single spokesperson instantly adapted for every region. On the other, it introduces new risks around deepfake misuse, identity governance, and regulatory compliance. Enterprises will need to develop policies for avatar creation, approval, and usage to avoid reputational or legal exposure. The ability to generate non-human avatars also opens new creative avenues, but may complicate brand trust if not managed carefully.

results.title: Introducing Avatars in ElevenCreative: AI Talking Video - ElevenLabs
results.content:
### Create and reuse persistent identities

An avatar is a persistent visual identity built from reference images or a text prompt. Upload photos of a person, character, or animal, and ElevenCreative generates a base identity you can reuse across any number of videos. Avatars can be human or non-human, and each comes with a pre-selected default voice that you can change at any time.

Generate styles to create variations - different camera angles, outfits, and backgrounds - while maintaining the same underlying identity. The avatars you create or favorite live in your Assets and can be referenced in any prompt box or dragged directly into a generation. [...] Skip to content

# Introducing Avatars in ElevenCreative

Written by
:   Roger Barrull
:   Daniel Wei
:   Lyubo Raykov

Published

ListenListen to this article

Learn more

Try Avatars

Avatars is a new entry point in ElevenCreative for generating talking-head videos. It pairs ElevenLabs speech models with leading lip-syncing models in a single interface - so creators and marketers can go from script to finished video without switching platforms.

### One interface for voice and face [...] This is designed for creators and marketers who need visual consistency across campaigns and content. A course creator can produce an entire video series with the same on-screen instructor. A brand can maintain a consistent spokesperson across every market and language. A social creator can scale their personal presence without filming every post.

### Avatars

avatars

### Use avatars with video models

Avatars integrate with the video generation models available in ElevenCreative. Source images act as a character sheet so that the model maintains the same identity across scenes within a video. This lets creators build longer-form content with consistent characters rather than generating isolated clips.

### Scale with Flows

AI avatars are getting seriously realistic🚀  
  
ElevenLabs has introduced Avatars in ElevenCreative, allowing users to create studio-quality talking videos from a script, voice, and AI avatar. By combining its industry-leading voice technology with realistic digital presenters, ElevenLabs is expanding from audio generation into complete video production workflows.  
  
Could AI avatars replace traditional talking-head video production for creators and businesses?
